2023-T3-P1-S13.trunk: S+V：It comes at a time when …（此事发生之际，作者们正担忧…）
structure: 主句：It comes at a time
└ 定语从句〔when，修饰 a time〕：when authors are already worried about the consequences of the proposed merger between PRH and another big publisher
└ 同位语〔说明 another big publisher〕：Simon & Schuster
破折号后（补充说明/独立分句）：the reduction in the number of unaligned UK publishers is likely to lead to fewer bidding wars, lower advances, and more conformity in terms of what is published
├ lead to + 三个并列宾语：fewer bidding wars, lower advances, and more conformity
└ 介词宾语从句(what)：what is published（in terms of 的宾语）
2023-T3-P1-S13.logic: 主句 It comes at a time（when 定语从句修饰 a time，Simon & Schuster 同位语）；破折号后补充说明（the reduction… is likely to lead to… 三个并列宾语，what is published 宾语从句）。
notes: a time when…：when 定语从句修饰 a time；Simon & Schuster 是 another big publisher 的同位语。
破折号后是补充说明（合并的后果）；lead to + 三个并列宾语。
in terms of what is published：what 引导介词 in terms of 的宾语从句（在所出版内容方面）。

2023-T3-P1-S1.trunk: 条件+主句；分号并列：If you're heading for …, you might have to be prepared to hunt around a bit; the same may be true of …
structure: 条件状语从句(If)：If you're heading for your nearest branch of Waterstones in search of the Duchess of Sussex's new children's book The Bench（The Bench 为同位语）
主句：you might have to be prepared to hunt around a bit
分号并列分句：the same may be true of The President's Daughter, the new thriller by Bill Clinton and James Patterson（同位语补充）
2023-T3-P1-S1.logic: If 条件从句（in search of… 状语，The Bench 同位语）；主句 you might have to be prepared to…；分号接并列分句（the same may be true of…，同位语补充）。
notes: If 引导条件状语从句；in search of 寻找；The Bench 是 book 的同位语。
be prepared to do：准备好做…；hunt around 四处搜寻。
the same may be true of…：分号并列分句（…也是如此）；the new thriller… 是 The President's Daughter 的同位语。

2023-T3-P1-S14.trunk: S+V+O(if 宾语从句，错综虚拟)：one wonders if PRH would have been confident enough … if it weren't … such a big company …
structure: └ 宾语从句(if)：PRH would have been confident enough to deal with Waterstones in the way it has if it weren't quite such a big company … and likely to get bigger
├ 定语从句〔省略 that，修饰 the way〕：it has (dealt)〔the way (that) it has，句末省略 dealt〕
└ 虚拟条件从句(if)：if it weren't quite such a big company … and likely to get bigger（括号插入：it was formed with the merger of Penguin and Random House in 2013）
2023-T3-P1-S14.logic: one wonders if…（if 宾语从句，含虚拟）；in the way (that) it has (done) 定语从句修饰 the way；嵌套 if 虚拟条件从句（if it weren't… and (weren't) likely to get bigger）；括号插入补充。
notes: wonders if…：if 引导 wonder 的宾语从句（是否…）。
would have been … if it weren't …：错综虚拟（主句对过去 would have been，条件对现在 weren't）。
in the way (that) it has：the way 后省略关系词的定语从句，句末省略 dealt；括号内是插入补充。
